column2: Change the foreground color of a toggle shape
Create a prefabricated standard selection of connection points
Converts all selected text placeholders into real text boxes that allow grouping, among other things.
Set toggle shape background color to transparent
Set toggle shape line to transparent
Switches to the next state (i.e. shape in the group) of the toggle shape.
Switches to the previous state (i.e. shape in the group) of the toggle shape.
Applies ungroup until all nested groups are dissolved.
If shapes are selected, hide all selected shapes (visible=False); otherwise make shapes visible again (visible=True). If there are no invisible shapes, the last hidden shapes are hidden again.
When the Lock aspect ratio checkbox is enabled, the height and width settings change in proportion to each other.
When exact search is disabled, 'person' also finds 'personality', 'impersonal', etc.
If no text is selected and this option is enabled, the symbol is inserted as a raster graphic. This also works when clicking a symbol while holding the Ctrl key.
If no text is selected and this option is enabled, the symbol is inserted as a Unicode character. This is the default when no key is pressed.
If no text is selected and this option is enabled, the symbol is converted into a shape. This also works when clicking a symbol while holding the Shift key.
When at least two shapes are selected, a small indicator with the text 'Reference' is shown at the lower-left corner of the reference shape (first or last).
Replace values in all selected cells with the actually displayed text. The cell format is changed to 'Text'.
Angle of the shapes to each other
The angle of the first shape specifies the rotation of the circular arrangement.
Choose a folder and create a list of all files in this folder in a new sheet.
Choose a folder and create a list of all files in this folder and all subfolders in a new sheet.
Choose a folder and create a list of all folders in this folder and all subfolders in a new sheet.

Draw a text field at any position.

With the Shift key held, an underlined text box is inserted.

With the Ctrl key held, a sticker is inserted.
Shows a dialog to select the functions to apply.
Shows a dialog to select the language to apply to the presentation or the selected slides.
Shows a window for entering the selection address with the address of the current selection as the default value.
Shows icons for available icon fonts that can be inserted as a text symbol or graphic.\n\nNote: The icon fonts must be installed on the computer.
Shows information about the table. Useful for finding out beforehand whether a table is correctly detected.
Shows all slide numbers that contain associated linked shapes.
Shows the search results of the icon search for the desired search term
Shows a window with detailed information about the selected shape
Shows a selection of all hidden and very hidden sheets that can be selected for display.
Shows a small tool for evaluating formulas and calculations
Shows an overview of all custom styles in the current gallery.
Split cell contents into columns at each comma
Split cell contents into rows at each line break
Split the selected shapes into several shapes based on the text paragraphs. One shape with the corresponding text is created per paragraph.
The first selected shape replaces all other selected shapes, keeping the position and size of the replaced shapes.
Go to the first linked shape
Go to the last linked shape
Go to the next linked shape
Go to the previous linked shape
Two tabs for the toolbox with all advanced features together on page 2.
Insert the clipboard as a linked element (e.g. image, OLE object).
Insert clipboard on all selected slides
Insert the clipboard on all selected slides simultaneously.
Restore the stored selection on the current sheet.
Counts the number of all paragraphs (e.g. bullet points) of all selected shapes.
Counts the number of all words of all selected shapes.
Counts the number of all characters of all selected shapes (incl. spaces).
Counts the number of all rows of all selected shapes.
Counts the number of selected shapes.
Counts the number of recognizable numbers in the current selection, which are shown summed up in the Sum field.
Counts the number of selected shapes or their child shapes (i.e. shapes within groups or cells within tables).
Counts the number of selected shapes or their child shapes that contain text.
Counts the number of linked shapes on all slides.
